 ## Lessons Learned
-1. ✅ Only social_media and referral_program produce leads/conversions
-2. ❌ Enterprise channels (linkedin, content_marketing, referral) produce ZERO leads
-3. ✅ Targeted dev ACCUMULATES per-group bonus (5× coefficient, persists forever)
-4. ✅ R&D is essential for quality jumps impossible via dev spend alone
-5. ✅ S1 converts best at Plan A ($9.99) with low quality needs
-6. ✅ S3 reputation heavily influences E2 (0.55 weight) - building S3 = free enterprise pipeline
-7. ✅ Dev spend has logarithmic saturation - reduced from $1400→$900/day
-8. ⚠️ Quality floors have ±65% noise at info level 1 - real values could be much higher
-9. ✅ ops: $350 keeps outage risk ~1.1% - adequate for 23 subs
-10. ⚠️ All group info at level 1 (±65%) - need research_group to improve accuracy
-11. ❌ S2 floor (0.37) is very high - even post-R&D marginal on Plan C, may need targeted dev
-12. ✅ Capacity tier 0 is fine - only 128/50000 units used
